title: Wooden Montessori Learning Tower Space-Saving: Foldable Learning Tower, Stool for Children, Foldable Kids' Step Stool, Learning Tower with Anti-Tip Protection
features: Innovative Design: Our helper tower features a remarkably stable structure that allows children to safely reach kitchen surfaces and actively participate in cooking activities, ensuring a safe environment for exploration

Promotes Independence: This product has been specifically designed to encourage toddlers to explore their surroundings and learn through hands-on experiences in the kitchen, fostering independence and self-confidence while working alongside parents

Compact and Space-Saving: The helper tower easily folds up for convenient storage, making it an ideal addition to any home without taking up valuable space, ensuring it can be tucked away when not in use

Easy to Clean: With smooth surfaces and made from durable materials, this helper tower ensures quick and effortless cleaning and maintenance, keeping it hygienic and looking new for your child's daily use
Ideal for Learning: this tower provides the perfect height for small children to assist with various tasks, promoting active learning and participation in family activities
